notes: SHIP v1.14.296 - N-13(a) P1 reference-content fix (data-honesty): corrected the APC<->UPC 'insertion loss' error in the Crash Cart optics reference. The content claimed mixing APC/UPC connectors causes '~60dB insertion loss' - but 60dB is APC's RETURN-LOSS spec (the file's own table states 'Return loss APC >=60dB' four rows away); insertion loss from an APC/UPC mismatch is a few dB at most (60dB = ~1e6x attenuation, not what a ferrule gap produces). The warning is correct (never mix them); the number/mechanism was wrong. Fixed all 4 live spots: L13045 optics alert bar ('the angled ferrule won't seat, so return loss collapses and the link fails'), L13072 troubleshooting table symptom cell ('Return loss destroyed; won't seat'), L13493 SC-APC/UPC warning bar ('destroying return loss'), L16043 search-index snippet ('wrecks return loss'). Text-only, no braces/JS/data touched. Three-stamp .295->.296; braces 11737/11737 unchanged; CRLF preserved. NO device-verify needed (content correctness, field-facing misinformation removed) - rides the pending .286->.296 batch sweep. SCOPE: the specific 60dB error only. N-13(b) - the broader reference-layer audit (DOM alarm values, reach tables, temp limits, vendor compat, GB300/NVLink text, cleaning thresholds) + provenance strips (fixed values must show their optic standard/source) - remains a separate campaign needing owner prioritization. Backlog from running-list drop (5): N-09 FORGE door, N-06 Rail Compass, N-10 Crash-Cart search-first, N-11 Work Active-Workspace, N-12 phase stepper, N-13(b) ref audit, N-14 card states, N-15 long-IDs, N-16 depth layers, N-17 live status strip, N-18 motion budget, + cheap fixes (Ref->Crash Cart rename, nav backdrop, IOU-note strip) - all need owner sequencing, not autopilot. Batch device-verify .286->.296 still open.
